    simpa [Nat.gcd_eq_right_iff_dvd, Nat.gcd_rec] using (Nat.gcd_rec (14*n + 3) (7*n + 1))
  have : Nat.gcd (21*n + 4) (14*n + 3) = Nat.gcd (7*n + 1) 1 := by
    have : 14*n + 3 - 2*(7*n + 1) = 1 := by

      Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) =
        Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4 - (14 * n + 3)) (14 * n + 3) := by
    simpa [Nat.gcd_eq_gcd_ab] using (Nat.gcd_eq_gcd_ab (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3))
  have h1 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) = Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) (14 * n + 3) := by

    simpa [Nat.gcd_eq_gcd_ab] using (Nat.gcd_eq_gcd_ab (14 * n + 3) (7 * n + 1)).symm
  have h3 : Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) (14 * n + 3) = Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) 1 := by

    simpa [h2, this]

have h1 : Nat.gcd (21*n + 4) (14*n + 3) = Nat.gcd (14*n + 3) (7*n + 1) := by

  have h2 : Nat.gcd (14*n + 3) (7*n + 1) = Nat.gcd (7*n + 1) 1 := by

      have hle : 7*n + 1 ≤ 14*n + 3 := by

        Nat.mul_left_comm, Nat.mul_comm] using (Nat.mod_eq_sub_mod hle)
    simpa [hmod, Nat.gcd_rec] using this
  simpa [h1, h2]

    have h1 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) ∣ (21 * n + 4) := Nat.gcd_dvd_left _ _
    have h2 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) ∣ (14 * n + 3) := Nat.gcd_dvd_right _ _

    have : 2 * (21 * n + 4) - 3 * (14 * n + 3) = 1 := by omega
    simpa [this] using h3
  exact Nat.dvd_one.mp h

have h1 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) = Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) (14 * n + 3) := by

have h1 : Nat.gcd (21*n + 4) (14*n + 3) = Nat.gcd (7*n + 1) (14*n + 3) := by

  have h2 : Nat.gcd (7*n + 1) (14*n + 3) = Nat.gcd (7*n + 1) 1 := by

have h₁ : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) = Nat.gcd (14 * n + 3) (7 * n + 1) := by
    simpa [Nat.gcd_comm, Nat.gcd_sub_left, Nat.mul_assoc, Nat.mul_left_comm, Nat.mul_comm, two_mul,
      add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm, Nat.add_sub_cancel_left] using
      (Nat.gcd_eq_right_iff_dvd.2 (by
        refine Nat.dvd_of_modEq ?_
        -- placeholder to satisfy typechecker; overwritten by next line
        exact Nat.ModEq.refl _))
  have h₂ : Nat.gcd (14 * n + 3) (7 * n + 1) = Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) 1 := by
    have : Nat.gcd (14 * n + 3) (7 * n + 1) = Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) ((14 * n + 3) % (7 * n + 1)) := by
      simpa [Nat.gcd_rec] using (rfl : Nat.gcd (14 * n + 3) (7 * n + 1) =
        Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) ((14 * n + 3) % (7 * n + 1)))
    have hmod : (14 * n + 3) % (7 * n + 1) = 1 := by
      have hn : 1 ≤ n := Nat.succ_le_iff.2 h₀
      have hpos : 0 < 7 * n + 1 := Nat.succ_pos _
      have hlt : 7 * n + 2 < 2 * (7 * n + 1) := by
        simpa [two_mul, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm] using Nat.lt_succ_self (7 * n + 1 + (7 * n + 1))
      have : (14 * n + 3) = 2 * (7 * n + 1) + 1 := by
        ring
      -- Use `Nat.mod_eq_of_lt` after rewriting as (7*n+2)
      have : (14 * n + 3) % (7 * n + 1) = (7 * n + 2) % (7 * n + 1) := by
        -- (14n+3) = (7n+1) + (7n+2)
        have : 14 * n + 3 = (7 * n + 1) + (7 * n + 2) := by ring
        simpa [this, Nat.add_mod, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt (Nat.lt_succ_self _), Nat.mod_eq_of_lt (Nat.lt_succ_self _)]
      -- (7n+2) % (7n+1) = 1
      have : (7 * n + 2) % (7 * n + 1) = 1 := by
        have hlt : 7 * n + 2 < 2 * (7 * n + 1) := by
          have : 7 * n + 2 < (7 * n + 1) + (7 * n + 1) := by
            simpa [two_mul, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm] using Nat.lt_succ_self (7 * n + 1 + (7 * n + 1))
          simpa [two_mul] using this
        -- since (7n+2) = (7n+1) + 1
        have : 7 * n + 2 = (7 * n + 1) + 1 := by omega
        simpa [this, Nat.add_mod, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt (Nat.lt_succ_self _), Nat.mod_eq_of_lt (Nat.lt_succ_self _)]
      simpa [this] using this
    simpa [this, hmod] using this
  -- simpler direct Euclid chain
  have : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) = Nat.gcd (14 * n + 3) (7 * n + 1) := by
    -- gcd(a,b)=gcd(b,a-b) with a≥b
    have hab : 14 * n + 3 ≤ 21 * n + 4 := by nlinarith
    simpa [Nat.gcd_comm, Nat.gcd_sub_left, hab] using (Nat.gcd_sub_left (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3))
  have : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) = Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) 1 := by
    -- apply again to (14n+3,7n+1)
    have hle : 7 * n + 1 ≤ 14 * n + 3 := by nlinarith
    have : Nat.gcd (14 * n + 3) (7 * n + 1) = Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) ((14 * n + 3) - (7 * n + 1)) := by
      simpa [Nat.gcd_comm, Nat.gcd_sub_left, hle] using (Nat.gcd_sub_left (14 * n + 3) (7 * n + 1))
    have : Nat.gcd (14 * n + 3) (7 * n + 1) = Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) (7 * n + 2) := by
      simpa [Nat.sub_eq_iff_eq_add.2 (by nlinarith), add_assoc, add_comm, add_left_comm] using this
    have : Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) (7 * n + 2) = Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) 1 := by
      have hle : 1 ≤ 7 * n + 2 := by nlinarith
      simpa [Nat.gcd_add_right, add_assoc, add_comm, add_left_comm] using
        (show Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) (7 * n + 1 + 1) = Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) 1 by
          simpa [Nat.gcd_add_right, add_assoc, add_comm, add_left_comm])
    -- combine
    simpa [this] using congrArg (fun x => x) this

have h1 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) = Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) (14 * n + 3) := by
    simpa [Nat.gcd_eq_gcd_ab] using (Nat.gcd_eq_gcd_ab (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) (-1))
  have h2 : Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) (14 * n + 3) = Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) 1 := by
    simpa [Nat.gcd_eq_gcd_ab] using (Nat.gcd_eq_gcd_ab (7 * n + 1) (14 * n + 3) (-2))
  simpa [h1, h2]

have h1 : Nat.gcd (21*n + 4) (14*n + 3) = Nat.gcd (21*n + 4 - (14*n + 3)) (14*n + 3) := by
    simpa [Nat.gcd_eq_gcd_ab, Nat.sub_eq_iff_eq_add.mpr] using (Nat.gcd_eq_gcd_sub_left (21*n + 4) (14*n + 3))
  have h2 : Nat.gcd (21*n + 4) (14*n + 3) = Nat.gcd (7*n + 1) (14*n + 3) := by
    have : 14 * n + 3 ≤ 21 * n + 4 := by
      have : 14 * n ≤ 21 * n := by
        exact Nat.mul_le_mul_right n (by decide : 14 ≤ 21)
      exact Nat.add_le_add this (by decide : 3 ≤ 4)
    simpa [Nat.gcd_eq_gcd_ab, Nat.sub_eq, this, Nat.mul_sub_left_distrib, Nat.mul_sub_right_distrib,
      Nat.mul_add, Nat.add_mul, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_comm, Nat.mul_assoc,
      Nat.mul_left_comm, Nat.mul_comm, Nat.sub_add_eq, Nat.add_sub_cancel, Nat.sub_sub, Nat.sub_self,
      Nat.succ_eq_add_one] using (Nat.gcd_eq_gcd_sub_left (21*n + 4) (14*n + 3))
  have h3 : Nat.gcd (7*n + 1) (14*n + 3) = Nat.gcd (7*n + 1) ((14*n + 3) - 2*(7*n + 1)) := by
    have : 2 * (7 * n + 1) ≤ 14 * n + 3 := by
      nlinarith
    simpa [Nat.gcd_eq_gcd_ab, Nat.sub_eq, this, Nat.mul_assoc, Nat.mul_left_comm, Nat.mul_comm,
      Nat.mul_add, Nat.add_mul, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_comm, Nat.mul_assoc,
      Nat.mul_left_comm, Nat.mul_comm] using (Nat.gcd_eq_gcd_sub_right (7*n + 1) (14*n + 3) (2*(7*n + 1)))
  have h4 : Nat.gcd (7*n + 1) (14*n + 3) = Nat.gcd (7*n + 1) 1 := by
    nlinarith
  simpa using (by
    have : Nat.gcd (21*n + 4) (14*n + 3) = Nat.gcd (7*n + 1) 1 := by
      nlinarith
    simpa [this])

have h₁ : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) = Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4 - (14 * n + 3)) (14 * n + 3) := by
    simpa [Nat.gcd_eq_gcd_ab, Nat.sub_eq] using (Nat.gcd_sub_right (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3))
  have hdiff : 14 * n + 3 ≤ 21 * n + 4 := by
    have : 14 * n ≤ 21 * n := by
      simpa [Nat.mul_le_mul_right] using (Nat.mul_le_mul_left n (show 14 ≤ 21 by decide))
    exact Nat.add_le_add this (by decide)
  have : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) = Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) (14 * n + 3) := by
    have hs : 21 * n + 4 - (14 * n + 3) = 7 * n + 1 := by
      have : 21 * n - 14 * n = 7 * n := by
        ring
      omega
    simpa [h₁, hs]
  rw [this]
  have : Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) (14 * n + 3) = Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) (14 * n + 3 - 2 * (7 * n + 1)) := by
    simpa using (Nat.gcd_sub_mul_right (7 * n + 1) (14 * n + 3) 2)
  rw [this]
  have hs : 14 * n + 3 - 2 * (7 * n + 1) = 1 := by
    omega
  simp [hs]

have h : Nat.gcd (21*n + 4) (14*n + 3) = Nat.gcd (7*n + 1) (14*n + 3) := by
    simpa [Nat.gcd_eq_gcd_ab, Nat.sub_eq, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc,
      Nat.mul_assoc, Nat.mul_left_comm, Nat.mul_comm, Nat.add_mul, Nat.mul_add] using
      (Nat.gcd_eq_right_iff_dvd.mpr (by
        have : 7 * (14*n + 3) ≤ 21*n + 4 + 7 * (14*n + 3) := by
          exact Nat.le_add_left _ _
        exact Nat.dvd_add_right (14*n + 3) (21*n + 4) ▸ Nat.dvd_add_left (21*n + 4) (7 * (14*n + 3)))
  have h1 : Nat.gcd (7*n + 1) (14*n + 3) = Nat.gcd (7*n + 1) 1 := by
    have : Nat.gcd (7*n + 1) (14*n + 3) = Nat.gcd (7*n + 1) ((14*n + 3) - 2*(7*n + 1)) := by
      simpa [Nat.gcd_eq_gcd_ab, Nat.sub_eq, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc,
        Nat.mul_assoc, Nat.mul_left_comm, Nat.mul_comm, Nat.add_mul, Nat.mul_add] using
        (Nat.gcd_eq_right_iff_dvd.mpr (by
          exact Nat.dvd_sub (Nat.gcd_dvd_right (7*n + 1) (14*n + 3))
            (Nat.dvd_mul_of_dvd_right (Nat.gcd_dvd_left (7*n + 1) (14*n + 3)) 2)))
    have : (14*n + 3) - 2*(7*n + 1) = 1 := by

    simpa [this]

have h₁ : Nat.gcd (21*n + 4) (14*n + 3) = Nat.gcd (7*n + 1) (14*n + 3) := by
    simpa [Nat.gcd_eq_right_iff_dvd, Nat.add_mul] using (Nat.gcd_add_mul_right_right (7*n + 1) (14*n + 3) 1).symm
  have h₂ : Nat.gcd (7*n + 1) (14*n + 3) = Nat.gcd (7*n + 1) 1 := by
    have : Nat.gcd (7*n + 1) (14*n + 3) = Nat.gcd (7*n + 1) ((14*n + 3) - 2*(7*n + 1)) := by
      simpa [Nat.gcd_eq_right_iff_dvd, Nat.add_mul] using (Nat.gcd_sub_mul_left_left (14*n + 3) (7*n + 1) 2)
    have : (14*n + 3) - 2*(7*n + 1) = 1 := by

    simpa [this]
  simpa [h₁, h₂]

have h : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) = Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (7 * n + 1) := by
    simpa [Nat.gcd_eq_right_iff_dvd, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.mul_assoc,
      Nat.mul_left_comm, Nat.mul_comm, Nat.gcd_add_mul_right_right] using
      (Nat.gcd_add_mul_right_right (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) 1)
  have h' : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (7 * n + 1) = Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) 1 := by
    have := Nat.gcd_add_mul_left_left (7 * n + 1) (21 * n + 4) (-3 : ℤ)
    -- workaround: use gcd_add_mul_right_right twice in ℕ form
    have h1 : Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) (21 * n + 4) = Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) (1) := by
      -- (21n+4) - 3*(7n+1) = 1
      have : Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) (21 * n + 4) = Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) ((21 * n + 4) + (7 * n + 1) * 0) := by
        simp
      -- use gcd_add_mul_right_right with k=3 on second argument: (21n+4) + (7n+1)*3 = 42n+7, then symmetric subtract via again
      -- simpler: use Nat.gcd_eq_right_iff_dvd with explicit dvd: gcd divides 1
      have hg : Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) (21 * n + 4) ∣ 1 := by
        have hg1 : Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) (21 * n + 4) ∣ (21 * n + 4) := Nat.gcd_dvd_right _ _
        have hg2 : Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) (21 * n + 4) ∣ (7 * n + 1) := Nat.gcd_dvd_left _ _
        have : Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) (21 * n + 4) ∣ (21 * n + 4) - 3 * (7 * n + 1) := by
          exact Nat.dvd_sub (by
            have : 3 * (7 * n + 1) ≤ (21 * n + 4) := by
              nlinarith
            exact this) hg1 (Nat.mul_dvd_mul_left 3 hg2)
        have : Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) (21 * n + 4) ∣ 1 := by
          simpa [Nat.mul_add, Nat.add_mul, Nat.mul_assoc, Nat.left_distrib, Nat.right_distrib,
            Nat.mul_comm, Nat.mul_left_comm, Nat.mul_assoc, Nat.sub_eq, Nat.succ_eq_add_one] using this
        exact this
      have : Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) (21 * n + 4) = 1 := Nat.dvd_one.mp hg
      simpa [Nat.gcd_comm] using this
    simpa [Nat.gcd_comm] using h1
  calc
    Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3)
        = Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (7 * n + 1) := by
            simpa [Nat.gcd_add_mul_right_right, Nat.mul_add, Nat.add_mul, Nat.mul_assoc, Nat.mul_left_comm,
              Nat.mul_comm, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_comm]
    _ = 1 := by
            have : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (7 * n + 1) ∣ 1 := by
              have h1 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (7 * n + 1) ∣ (21 * n + 4) := Nat.gcd_dvd_left _ _
              have h2 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (7 * n + 1) ∣ (7 * n + 1) := Nat.gcd_dvd_right _ _
              have : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (7 * n + 1) ∣ (21 * n + 4) - 3 * (7 * n + 1) := by
                refine Nat.dvd_sub ?_ h1 (Nat.mul_dvd_mul_left 3 h2)
                nlinarith
              simpa using this
            exact Nat.dvd_one.mp this

have h : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) = Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) (14 * n + 3) := by
    simpa [Nat.gcd_eq_right_iff_dvd, Nat.gcd_eq_left_iff_dvd] using (Nat.gcd_eq_gcd_ab (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) 1 (-1))
  -- The above approach is too convoluted; use gcd_rec directly:
  -- We'll proceed with a clean Euclidean algorithm computation.
  have : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) = Nat.gcd (14 * n + 3) (7 * n + 1) := by
    simpa [Nat.gcd_rec] using (Nat.gcd_rec (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3))
  have : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) = Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) (0 * n + 1) := by
    -- gcd (14n+3) (7n+1) then reduce: (14n+3) % (7n+1) = 1
    have hmod : (14 * n + 3) % (7 * n + 1) = 1 := by
      have hle : 7 * n + 1 ≤ 14 * n + 3 := by
        nlinarith
      have : (14 * n + 3) = 2 * (7 * n + 1) + 1 := by
        ring
      -- use mod_eq_of_lt via rewriting
      -- compute remainder from division algorithm
      have : (14 * n + 3) % (7 * n + 1) = (2 * (7 * n + 1) + 1) % (7 * n + 1) := by
        simpa [this]
      -- simplify mod
      simpa [Nat.add_mod, Nat.mul_mod, Nat.mod_eq_sub_mod, Nat.mod_self, Nat.zero_mod, Nat.one_mod] using
        (by
          -- direct simp works:
          simpa [show 14 * n + 3 = 2 * (7 * n + 1) + 1 by ring] )
    -- Now apply gcd_rec twice
    calc
      Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3)
          = Nat.gcd (14 * n + 3) ((21 * n + 4) % (14 * n + 3)) := by
              simpa [Nat.gcd_rec]
      _ = Nat.gcd (14 * n + 3) (7 * n + 1) := by
              have : (21 * n + 4) % (14 * n + 3) = 7 * n + 1 := by
                -- 21n+4 = 1*(14n+3) + (7n+1)
                have : 21 * n + 4 = (14 * n + 3) + (7 * n + 1) := by ring
                -- remainder equals the smaller addend since it's < divisor
                have hlt : 7 * n + 1 < 14 * n + 3 := by nlinarith
                simpa [this, Nat.add_mod, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt hlt]
              simpa [this]
      _ = Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) ((14 * n + 3) % (7 * n + 1)) := by
              simpa [Nat.gcd_comm, Nat.gcd_rec]
      _ = Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) 1 := by
              simpa [hmod]
      _ = 1 := by simp
  simpa using this

have h :
      Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) =
        Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4 - (14 * n + 3)) (14 * n + 3) := by
    simpa [Nat.gcd_eq_gcd_ab] using (Nat.gcd_eq_gcd_ab (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3))
  have h' :
      Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) =
        Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) (14 * n + 3) := by
    have hsub : 21 * n + 4 - (14 * n + 3) = 7 * n + 1 := by
      omega
    simpa [hsub] using h
  have h'' :
      Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) (14 * n + 3) =
        Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) ((14 * n + 3) - 2 * (7 * n + 1)) := by
    simpa [Nat.gcd_eq_gcd_ab] using (Nat.gcd_eq_gcd_ab (14 * n + 3) (7 * n + 1)).trans
      (by simp [Nat.gcd_comm])
  have h''' :
      Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) (14 * n + 3) = Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) 1 := by
    have hsub : (14 * n + 3) - 2 * (7 * n + 1) = 1 := by
      omega
    simpa [hsub] using h''
  simpa [h', h''', Nat.gcd_comm] using (Nat.gcd_eq_right (7 * n + 1) (by simp))

have h1 : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) = Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) (14 * n + 3) := by
    simpa [Nat.gcd_eq_right_iff_dvd, Nat.gcd_rec] using (Nat.gcd_eq_gcd_ab (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) 1 0)
  have h2 : Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) (14 * n + 3) = Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) 1 := by
    have : Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) (14 * n + 3) = Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) ((14 * n + 3) - 2 * (7 * n + 1)) := by
      simpa [Nat.gcd_eq_right_iff_dvd, Nat.gcd_rec] using (Nat.gcd_eq_gcd_ab (7 * n + 1) (14 * n + 3) 1 (-2))
    have hsub : (14 * n + 3) - 2 * (7 * n + 1) = 1 := by
      nlinarith
    simpa [hsub] using this
  simpa [h1, h2]

have h₁ : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) = Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4 - (14 * n + 3)) (14 * n + 3) := by
    simpa [Nat.gcd_eq_right_iff_dvd, Nat.gcd_sub_right_left] using (Nat.gcd_sub_right_left (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3))
  have hpos : 14 * n + 3 ≤ 21 * n + 4 := by
    nlinarith [h₀]
  have h₂ : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) = Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) (14 * n + 3) := by
    have : 21 * n + 4 - (14 * n + 3) = 7 * n + 1 := by nlinarith
    simpa [h₁, this]
  have h₃ : Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) (14 * n + 3) = Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) (14 * n + 3 - 2 * (7 * n + 1)) := by
    simpa [Nat.gcd_eq_right_iff_dvd, Nat.gcd_sub_left_right] using
      (Nat.gcd_sub_left_right (7 * n + 1) (14 * n + 3) (2 * (7 * n + 1)))
  have h₄ : Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) (14 * n + 3) = Nat.gcd (7 * n + 1) 1 := by
    have : 14 * n + 3 - 2 * (7 * n + 1) = 1 := by nlinarith
    simpa [h₂, h₃, this]
  simpa [h₄]
